_README: Seed file. Fill in concrete subreddits, channel ids, and FB groups before flipping social_outreach_enabled=true. Suggested first-night reddit targets in the comments below.

youtube._note: Recon-only for now — Phase 3 servo posting on YouTube isn't wired yet, so candidates here will sit in `drafted` until reviewed manually. Each entry is a free-form search profile; recon prepends 'site:youtube.com'. Profiles tuned for video-first ranking — bare phrases like 'ComfyUI tutorial' surfaced playlists/channels in DDG; adding 'walkthrough' / verbs / a year hint pulls actual /watch?v= URLs.
